_Sandbox_comment: Mode: "Host" runs bash directly on the host (default, backward compatible). "Docker" runs each bash command in a throwaway container with --network=none and a bind-mounted worktree; requires `./sandbox/build.sh` to be run once. Other fields only matter in Docker mode.
_MaxOutputTokens_comment: Per-provider override of the per-turn output ceiling. Optional; defaults to 16384 when unset. Cheap reasoning executors (codex-mini) want headroom for hidden CoT + a real write payload; premium models (Sonnet, Opus) want lower caps to bound cost.
